goal: Ship v7.6 provider-neutral session export without depending on a vendor stream as source of truth.
risk: AOF could claim session portability while prompts, responses, tool calls, artifacts, task links, requirement links, tests, risks, decisions, redaction boundaries, or release-ready evidence remain provider-locked or hidden.
loss_boundary: No provider-neutral export claim without required event summaries, resolvable links, source-of-truth boundary, redaction boundary, release-ready boundary, and not-proven limits.
acceptance_gates: release-state-audit includes session-export-audit for 7.6.0 and later
evidence_plan: schema, writer, audit command, CLI help, focused tests, and release evidence
TASK-095 Council review, Work Execution Packet, Multi-Actor Pilot, Parallel Lane Pilot, Requirement Coverage, and Session Export artifact
stop_conditions: stop if required event types are missing
stop if redaction boundary or source-of-truth boundary is missing
